title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026 — Editorial Cover Rebuild
title_cn: Azure Jewelry 2026 产品图册 — 封面重建版
description: V8 cover rebuild: a more fashion-forward Page 1 with a stronger masthead, sharper hierarchy, and a more magnetic editorial composition, while keeping the V7 interior intact. 17 pages.
description_cn: V8 封面重建：以更时尚的刊头式构图重做 P1，强化层级、张力与吸引力，其余内页保持 V7 主线不变。17 页。

title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026 — Luxury Refinement Pass
title_cn: Azure Jewelry 2026 产品图册 — 奢华精修版
description: V7 luxury polish pass: refined cover typography, stronger blue-page readability, cleaner Page 14 framing, calmer Page 15 spacing, and a more client-facing pink narrative. 17 pages.
description_cn: V7 奢华精修：强化封面字标与蓝底页可读性，补足 P14 引导语，清理 P15 间距，并将粉钻页文案调整为更面向客户的语气。17 页。

title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026 — Targeted Fix Pass
title_cn: Azure Jewelry 2026 产品图册 — 定点修正版
description: Targeted V6 fix pass: stronger cover and CTA legibility, corrected blue/yellow/green cut-to-image matching, less pink-page repetition, and improved P15 CTA spacing. 17 pages.
description_cn: V6 定点修正：增强封面与联系页可读性，修正蓝钻/黄钻/绿钻页面的图像与切工匹配，降低粉钻页重复感，并优化 P15 底部 CTA 留白。17 页。

title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026 — Refined Edition
title_cn: Azure Jewelry 2026 产品图册 — 精修版
description: Image-verified refinement: all photos visually confirmed per color category, cover and CTA contrast boosted, no duplicate or mislabeled images. 17 pages.
description_cn: 图片逐一目视确认：颜色分类准确、封面及联系页文字对比度增强、无重复或错标图片。17 页。

title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026 — Clean Edition
title_cn: Azure Jewelry 2026 产品图册 — 清爽版
description: Clean white-based design with brighter sky-azure blue. All overlaps fixed, no dark backgrounds, no duplicate images, no empty pages. 17 pages.
description_cn: 白底清爽设计，更明亮天蓝色。修复所有重叠问题，无暗色背景，无重复图片，无空白页。17 页。

title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026 — Sky Blue Edition
title_cn: Azure Jewelry 2026 产品图册 — 天蓝编辑版
description: Editorial redesign with sky-blue Azure identity and editorial layouts.
description_cn: 天蓝色品牌识别，编辑感版面。

title: Azure Jewelry Collection 2026
description: Original product catalog with white and fancy color diamonds.
